mapper.select: SELECT PD.ID, PD.PURCHASE_ID, PD.APPLICATION_DETAIL_ID, PD.APPLICATION_QUANTITY, PD.PURCHASE_QUANTITY, PD.TAX_RATE, PD.TAX_INCLUDED_UNIT_PRICE, PD.TAX_EXCLUDED_UNIT_PRICE, PD.TAX_INCLUDED_AMOUNT, PD.TAX_EXCLUDED_AMOUNT, PD.TAX_AMOUNT, AD.MATERIAL_NAME, AD.MATERIAL_CODE, AD.SPECIFICATION_MODEL, AD.UNIT, A.APPLICATION_NO, A.APPLICATION_TITLE, CASE WHEN c3.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL AND c2.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL AND c.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN c3.CATEGORY_NAME || '/' || c2.CATEGORY_NAME || '/' || c.CATEGORY_NAME WHEN c2.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL AND c.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN c2.CATEGORY_NAME || '/' || c.CATEGORY_NAME WHEN c.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN c.CATEGORY_NAME ELSE '' END AS CATEGORY_NAME, PD.CREATE_BY, PD.CREATE_BY_NAME, PD.CREATE_TIME, PD.UPDATE_BY, PD.UPDATE_BY_NAME, PD.UPDATE_TIME FROM E_MATERIAL_PURCHASE_DETAIL PD LEFT JOIN E_MATERIAL_APPLICATION_DETAIL AD ON PD.APPLICATION_DETAIL_ID = AD.ID LEFT JOIN E_MATERIAL_APPLICATION A ON AD.APPLICATION_ID = A.ID LEFT JOIN E_MATERIAL_CODE MC ON AD.MATERIAL_CODE_ID = MC.ID AND MC.DEL_FLAG = 0 LEFT JOIN E_MATERIAL_CATEGORY c ON MC.CATEGORY_ID = c.ID AND c.DEL_FLAG = 0 LEFT JOIN E_MATERIAL_CATEGORY c2 ON c.PARENT_ID = c2.ID AND c2.DEL_FLAG = 0 LEFT JOIN E_MATERIAL_CATEGORY c3 ON c2.PARENT_ID = c3.ID AND c3.DEL_FLAG = 0 WHERE PD.PURCHASE_ID = #{purchaseId} ORDER BY PD.CREATE_TIME ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_MATERIAL_PURCHASE_DETAIL ( ID, PURCHASE_ID, APPLICATION_DETAIL_ID, APPLICATION_QUANTITY, PURCHASE_QUANTITY, TAX_RATE, TAX_INCLUDED_UNIT_PRICE, TAX_EXCLUDED_UNIT_PRICE, TAX_INCLUDED_AMOUNT, TAX_EXCLUDED_AMOUNT, TAX_AMOUNT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{purchaseId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{applicationDetailId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{applicationQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{purchaseQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{taxRate,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{taxIncludedUnitPrice,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{taxExcludedUnitPrice,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{taxIncludedAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{taxExcludedAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{taxAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

INSERT INTO E_MATERIAL_PURCHASE_DETAIL ( ID, PURCHASE_ID, APPLICATION_DETAIL_ID, APPLICATION_QUANTITY, PURCHASE_QUANTITY, TAX_RATE, TAX_INCLUDED_UNIT_PRICE, TAX_EXCLUDED_UNIT_PRICE, TAX_INCLUDED_AMOUNT, TAX_EXCLUDED_AMOUNT, TAX_AMOUNT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )
SELECT #{item.id}, #{item.purchaseId}, #{item.applicationDetailId}, #{item.applicationQuantity}, #{item.purchaseQuantity}, #{item.taxRate}, #{item.taxIncludedUnitPrice}, #{item.taxExcludedUnitPrice}, #{item.taxIncludedAmount}, #{item.taxExcludedAmount}, #{item.taxAmount}, #{item.loginUserId}, #{item.loginUserName}, #{item.now} FROM DUAL
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_MATERIAL_PURCHASE_DETAIL
PURCHASE_ID = #{purchaseId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
APPLICATION_DETAIL_ID = #{applicationDetailId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
APPLICATION_QUANTITY = #{applicationQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
APPLICATION_QUANTITY = NULL,
PURCHASE_QUANTITY = #{purchaseQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
TAX_RATE = #{taxRate,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
TAX_INCLUDED_UNIT_PRICE = #{taxIncludedUnitPrice,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
TAX_EXCLUDED_UNIT_PRICE = #{taxExcludedUnitPrice,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
TAX_INCLUDED_AMOUNT = #{taxIncludedAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
TAX_EXCLUDED_AMOUNT = #{taxExcludedAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
TAX_AMOUNT = #{taxAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
WHERE ID = #{id}
